name: FuzeOne Handoff
description: Shared cross-session handoff workspace. Agents persist concise work-state and durable context here (under /handoff/<id>.md) so a spawned or resumed agent can read prior state instead of it being inlined into prompts. Persists across sessions; write small focused files.

seed.content:
# Handoff memory

This store is mounted into every role session. Use it as the durable channel for agent-to-agent handoff:

- Write your work-state to `/handoff/<originating-session-id>.md` (small, focused).
- When you hand forward or resume another agent, pass the memory path in your summary/context_ref rather than pasting content.
- Read the relevant `/handoff/*.md` before starting delegated work.

Keep entries concise; prune stale ones. Individual memories cap at ~100kB; a store holds up to 2,000.
